summary: Tested 4 features: 1) Multi-tenant email uniqueness - verified email check is per-tenant. 2) Associate Director role - created AD with managed_members, verified AD can view/edit managed member tasks but not unmanaged. 3) Frontend - verified role dropdown has 'Associate Director', managed_members checkboxes appear when AD role selected. 4) Partner permissions - verified partner sees all tasks. Fixed 2 bugs: syntax error in UserProfileModal.js and missing managed_members initialization.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Multi-tenant Email): Email uniqueness check in users.py lines 113-118 correctly filters by tenant_id. Same email can exist in different tenants.

Feature 2 (Associate Director): UserRole enum includes ASSOCIATE_DIRECTOR. User model has managed_members field. tasks.py has get_managed_member_ids() and can_manage_task() helpers. AD sees own + managed members' tasks.
Feature 3 (Frontend): TeamMembers.js has 'associate_director' in role dropdown. UserProfileModal.js shows 'Allocate Team Members' checkboxes when role=associate_director.
Feature 4 (Partner Permissions): Partner role bypasses all task filtering - sees all tasks in tenant regardless of AD allocations.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Test users created during testing were cleaned up by pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Associate Director features fully tested. Key files: backend/routes/tasks.py (get_managed_member_ids, can_manage_task helpers), backend/routes/users.py (tenant-scoped email check), frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal.js (managed_members checkboxes), frontend/src/components/TeamMembers.js (AD role in dropdown). Known users in SCO1: Sonu kanwar (1e99009f-23a2-42ff-aad8-1caa7d54e951), Nitish Das (e7ae9f26-0684-44a6-ab56-14cfc5f868d8).

verification: Email uniqueness check in users.py filters by tenant_id (lines 113-118)
Duplicate email within same tenant correctly rejected with 400 error
Same email can theoretically exist in different tenants (per-tenant check)
Created AD with managed_members pointing to existing users
AD can view tasks of managed members via GET /api/tasks
AD can view specific managed member task via GET /api/tasks/{id}
AD can edit managed member task via PUT /api/tasks/{id}
AD cannot view tasks of unmanaged members (correctly filtered out)
TeamMembers.js role dropdown includes 'Associate Director' option
UserProfileModal.js shows 'Allocate Team Members' section when role=associate_director
Checkboxes for allocatable users (non-partner, non-AD, active) displayed
Partner sees all tasks in tenant regardless of AD allocations
Partner can edit any task in tenant
Partner role bypasses managed_members filtering in tasks.py

bugs_fixed.issue: Syntax error - extra closing tag at line 377
managed_members not initialized in isCreate mode causing 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading includes)' error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added managed_members: [] to initial formData when isCreate is true

playwright_verification: Team Members page accessible via Masters > Team
Add Team Member modal opens correctly
'Allocate Team Members' section appears when AD role selected
Team member checkboxes (Sonu kanwar, Nitish Das, Namita Mestry) displayed for allocation
